nodes.label: Kirsan Ilyumzhinov
nodes.summary: Former President of the Russian Republic of Kalmykia (only Buddhist republic in Russian Federation). Long-serving FIDE (World Chess Federation) President. Publicly claims September 1997 abduction from his Moscow penthouse by yellow-garmented beings.

sources.quote: President of Kalmykia 1993-2010; FIDE President 1995-2018; alleged 1997 abductee

nodes.label: Konstantin Tsiolkovsky
nodes.summary: Soviet rocket-science pioneer; Russian father of spaceflight theory. Cited by Ilyumzhinov as having anticipated extraterrestrial contact.

sources.quote: Soviet rocket pioneer; Russian space father

nodes.label: Yuri Gagarin
nodes.summary: First human in space; referenced by Ilyumzhinov for his famous 'from the ground towards the new' statement upon engine ignition.

sources.quote: First human in space; cited by Ilyumzhinov

nodes.label: 1997 Ilyumzhinov Moscow Abduction
nodes.summary: September 1997: Ilyumzhinov (then-sitting President of Kalmykia) abducted from his Moscow penthouse by beings in yellow garments. Entered via balcony-tube; shown football-field-sized laboratory-like interior; beings communicated telepathically; Ilyumzhinov confronted the driver, friend, and assistant who searched his apartment for over an hour.

sources.timestamp_end: Sitting president abducted from Moscow penthouse by yellow-garmented beings
Only Buddhist republic in Russian Federation

nodes.label: Kirsan Ilyumzhinov is a sitting president of a prominent nation (Kalmykia, Russian Federation) publi
nodes.summary: Kirsan Ilyumzhinov is a sitting president of a prominent nation (Kalmykia, Russian Federation) publicly claiming he was abducted by aliens in September 1997 — unprecedented.

sources.quote: A prominent nation who was abducted by aliens — sitting president in 1997. Kirsan Ilyumzhinov.

type_specific.statement_text: Kirsan Ilyumzhinov is a sitting president of a prominent nation (Kalmykia, Russian Federation) publicly claiming he was abducted by aliens in September 1997 — unprecedented.

nodes.label: Ilyumzhinov cites three witnesses (driver, friend, assistant) who searched his apartment for over an
nodes.summary: Ilyumzhinov cites three witnesses (driver, friend, assistant) who searched his apartment for over an hour finding only his slippers — corroborating his physical disappearance.

sources.quote: I had three witnesses. The driver, my friend who came for me, and my assistant. They searched the apartment for over an hour and couldn't find me. They went in — slippers are there.

type_specific.statement_text: Ilyumzhinov cites three witnesses (driver, friend, assistant) who searched his apartment for over an hour finding only his slippers — corroborating his physical disappearance.

nodes.label: The beings wore yellow garments and communicated through thoughts; interior was ~several football-fi
nodes.summary: The beings wore yellow garments and communicated through thoughts; interior was ~several football-fields in size; beings were experimenting on boxes brought up from somewhere else.

sources.quote: They were wearing yellow garments. Large space like several soccer fields. Communicated through thoughts.

type_specific.statement_text: The beings wore yellow garments and communicated through thoughts; interior was ~several football-fields in size; beings were experimenting on boxes brought up from somewhere else.

sources.quote: American Secretary of State Henry Kissinger. Henry had a small folder. Gorbachev sitting next to him said, not all but after that meeting. Trump, Putin, Xi Jinping, these they're aware of the alien presence and UFOs.

nodes.label: Ilyumzhinov asserts humans are the 'fifth civilization' — beings told him human history has ended pr
nodes.summary: Ilyumzhinov asserts humans are the 'fifth civilization' — beings told him human history has ended prior civilizations; current one must overcome weapons-invention addiction or end similarly.

sources.quote: We are the fifth civilization. All your science and efforts towards inventing weapons — bacterial, chemical, atomic weapons, with ways to kill more people.

type_specific.statement_text: Ilyumzhinov asserts humans are the 'fifth civilization' — beings told him human history has ended prior civilizations; current one must overcome weapons-invention addiction or end similarly.

Episode: “I Was Taken By Aliens In 1997!” -President of Russian Republic
Kirsan Ilyumzhinov is a sitting president of a prominent nation (Kalmykia, Russian Federation) publicly claiming he was abducted by aliens in September 1997 — unprecedented.
Ilyumzhinov cites three witnesses (driver, friend, assistant) who searched his apartment for over an hour finding only his slippers — corroborating his physical disappearance.
The beings wore yellow garments and communicated through thoughts; interior was ~several football-fields in size; beings were experimenting on boxes brought up from somewhere else.
Ilyumzhinov claims Henry Kissinger, Gorbachev, and current leaders (Trump, Putin, Xi Jinping) are aware of the alien presence; directly names Kissinger as having relevant knowledge.
Ilyumzhinov asserts humans are the 'fifth civilization' — beings told him human history has ended prior civilizations; current one must overcome weapons-invention addiction or end similarly.
